task: Advanced high-value task: Compressor Surge Operating Map Exception Driver Analysis. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for compressor surge operating map. Embedded packet: Records: R1 speed_krpm=12 flow_kgs=30 surge_flow_kgs=3; R2 speed_krpm=21 flow_kgs=26 surge_flow_kgs=6; R3 speed_krpm=7 flow_kgs=41 surge_flow_kgs=2. Remediation options: O1 changes speed_krpm by -12% cost=62000; O2 changes flow_kgs by -18% cost=84000; O3 changes surge_flow_kgs by -25% cost=46000; max_budget=108000. Rules and constraints: surge margin=(flow-surge_flow)/flow; margin<0.08 fail and 0.08-0.12 warn; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver compressor_surge_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
